description: Branch Switch Orchestration (ADR-14) — Detect git checkout and instantly switch knowledge graph context so AI agents always work against the correct branch without manual re-scan.

userStories.title: Unify detect_branch into single implementation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single detect_branch function that handles normal repos, worktrees, and detached HEAD so that duplicate implementations don't diverge.
acceptanceCriteria: Single detect_branch() in crates/seshat-cli/src/db.rs handles normal repo, worktree, detached HEAD
detached HEAD returns abbreviated commit hash (7+ chars hex)
Path .. components are normalized before resolution
detect_branch_from_path() removed from crates/seshat-watcher/src/lib.rs
Watcher call sites updated to use seshat_cli::detect_branch
Unit tests added for normal repo, worktree file, worktree nested, detached HEAD, no git
Typecheck passes: cargo check -p seshat-watcher -p seshat-cli

userStories.title: Fix ExistingDb branch detection to use project_root
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ExistingDb path to use repo_metadata.project_root for branch detection rather than db_path.parent() so that branch detection works correctly for repos outside the DB directory.
acceptanceCriteria: In serve.rs run_serve() ExistingDb path, pass repo_info.project_root to detect_branch() instead of db_path.parent()
Unit test added asserting detect_branch receives correct path
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace BranchId::from("main") hardcodes with instrumented fallbacks
userStories.description: As a developer, I want production code to derive BranchId from detect_branch() dynamically, with only instrumented fallbacks, so that branch context is always accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: db.rs load_project_info() fallback instrumented with tracing::debug!
scan.rs run_scan() fallback instrumented with tracing::debug!
serve.rs locations already correct — verified no regressions
All remaining production fallbacks have tracing::debug! logs
Test code hardcodes are unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Replace watcher bulk-rescan with ADR-14 snapshot switch
userStories.description: As a developer, I want git HEAD changes to trigger instant snapshot switches instead of full rescans, so that branch switching completes in under 2 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: hot_tier.rs replaces bulk rescan with SwitchEvent emission via new channel
serve.rs listens for SwitchEvent and runs handle_branch_switch()
If new_branch snapshot exists → switch_branch() instantly (<1s)
If no snapshot → create_snapshot() then switch_branch()
tokio::spawn background sync after switch
on_bulk_rescan callback replaced with on_branch_switch in WatcherHandle/params
tracing::info! with elapsed time on switch completion
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement diff-based background sync after branch switch
userStories.description: As a developer, I want background sync to diff old and new commit trees and re-parse only changed files, so sync time scales with changed files not project size.
acceptanceCriteria: background_sync() uses gix tree diff between old and new commits
Modified files are re-parsed and upserted into files_ir for new branch
Removed files are deleted from files_ir for new branch
gix::tree::diff failure falls back to full rescan with tracing::warn!
On completion: marks warm tier pending for convention rebuild
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add syncing and snapshot_based metadata to MCP responses
userStories.description: As a developer, I want MCP tool responses to include sync status metadata so that AI agents know when the knowledge graph might be stale.
acceptanceCriteria: sync_in_progress: Arc<AtomicBool> added to ProjectConnection or McpServer
Background sync sets flag to true at start, false at completion
All 5 MCP tools include syncing: true and snapshot_based: true in _metadata during sync
syncing and snapshot_based removed from metadata once sync completes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add 7 integration tests for branch switch orchestration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comprehensive integration tests covering branch switch, detached HEAD, background sync, and unified detect_branch behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: branch_switch_via_watcher_updates_metadata test passes
branch_switch_to_existing_snapshot_is_instant test passes (<2s)
branch_switch_creates_snapshot_when_missing test passes
background_sync_reparses_changed_files_only test passes
detached_head_returns_commit_hash test passes
unified_detect_branch_same_behavior_in_serve_and_watcher test passes
detect_branch_normalizes_gitdir_path_components test passes
All 12 worktree_integration tests pass (5 existing + 7 new)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Run final code review and mark Epic 11 complete
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the full test suite, clippy, and code review to pass before marking Epic 11 as completed.
acceptanceCriteria: cargo test passes full suite
cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes
cargo fmt -- --check passes
Adversarial code review completed and findings addressed
epics.md Epic 11 marked [COMPLETED]
Story file marked complete with Dev Agent Record
Typecheck passes
